title: oncosperma tigillarium
intro: Oncosperma tigillarium, also known as the Malabar spondias or Malabar plum, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oncosperma tigillarium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a herbal remedy by boiling its fruits or leaves in water, and it is also used to make traditional medicines in the form of extracts, powders, and tinctures.
